paper_reference.source: Docs/lw2025.md Appendix C / lwdid-py test_paper_table_7_validation.py Scenario 1C
notes: Uses the paper-backed common-timing DGP with controls x1/x2.
Tracks Monte Carlo bias and 95% CI coverage for the comprehensive sensitivity demean branch.
